subject: Math

lesson.story_mission: Join the Operations Trail team to understand division as equal sharing and equal groups.
lesson.mini_lesson: Understand division as equal sharing and equal groups.
lesson.objective: Understand division as equal sharing and equal groups.
lesson.concept_explanation: Understand division as equal sharing and equal groups. Use models, equations, and careful checking to explain each answer.
lesson.common_misconception: Learners may choose an operation too quickly or miss how the model connects to the equation.
lesson.real_world_connection: These skills help solve classroom supplies, games, snacks, teams, and sharing situations.
lesson.lesson_summary: Read the situation, build the model, write the equation, solve, and check with an inverse or another strategy.
hints: Read the problem and name what is known.
Use the model to connect numbers to an equation.
Check that the answer matches the question asked.

misconception_bank.sharing_grouping_confusion: Learner may mix up number of groups with number in each group.
misconception_bank.remainder_confusion: Learner may expect leftovers in no-remainder foundation facts.
misconception_bank.division_symbol_confusion: Learner may misread the division symbol or reverse dividend and divisor.
misconception_bank.inverse_operation_confusion: Learner may not use multiplication to check division.

game_theme.title: Division Foundations
game_theme.mission_intro: Complete the Operations Trail by proving you can understand division as equal sharing and equal groups.

story.text: Listen to this page. This mission introduces division as sharing equally and making equal groups. Look at how the objects are shared or grouped in the picture. Think about how the mission story connects to the math. Check that every group has the same amount as you get ready. Press Start Mission when you are ready.
story.label: Read This Page

lesson.text: This mini lesson teaches division as sharing equally and making equal groups. Look at how the objects are shared or grouped and read the vocabulary words. Check that every group has the same amount one step at a time. Watch out for leaving extras in a group or making groups uneven. Press Next to continue.
lesson.label: Read This Page

watch.text: This Watch page shows a worked example for Division Foundations. Look at the model and listen for how each part matches the question. Step one, read what is being asked. Step two, use the visual model. Step three, check the final answer with the right units or math words. Press Next to continue.
watch.label: Read This Page

demo.text: This guided demo lets you practice division as sharing equally and making equal groups with help. Look at how the objects are shared or grouped before you choose an answer. Check that every group has the same amount and explain your thinking in math words. Do not rush past leaving extras in a group or making groups uneven. Press Next to continue.
demo.label: Read This Page

practice.text: Practice time. Use the model to help you work on division as sharing equally and making equal groups. Check that every group has the same amount and check your answer. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Choose your answer when you are ready.
practice.label: Read This Page

challenge.text: Challenge time. The problem may need careful thinking about division as sharing equally and making equal groups. Look at how the objects are shared or grouped, then decide which strategy fits best. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Answer carefully, then continue.
challenge.label: Read This Page

checkpoint.text: Checkpoint time. Show what you know about division as sharing equally and making equal groups. Read the problem, use the visual, and check for leaving extras in a group or making groups uneven. Press Read Question if you want the exact question read aloud. Choose or write the answer when ready.
checkpoint.label: Read This Page

badge.text: This badge page celebrates your work on Division Foundations. Look at your stars and remember the strategy you used. Mistakes helped your brain grow when you checked them. Press Next to see your profile.
badge.label: Read This Page

profile.text: This profile page shows how your mission went. Look at your accuracy, hints, and growth notes. If a level needs more practice, go back to the hub or continue to Skill Practice. Use your results to choose what to practice next.
profile.label: Read This Page
